component.name: Workman
component.summary: Save and restore your desktop sessions

description.p: Workman remembers which apps you had open, where they were on screen, and how big they were — so you can pick up exactly where you left off.

With a single command you can save your entire desktop layout — every open app, its position, and its size — and restore it all later with another single command. You can save as many named sessions as you like and switch between them instantly.
Requires the Workman GNOME Shell extension to be installed and enabled.
Add 'workman --version'; provide official Debian/Ubuntu (.deb) and Fedora (.rpm) packages.
Faster session switching: restore now reuses already-open windows instead of launching duplicates, and the new "restore --close-others" flag closes apps that are not part of the session.
Detect unsupported desktop environments and print a clear message; this version supports GNOME on Wayland only.
